title: TableRAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Large-Scale Table Understanding

defines.name: TableRAG
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented generation framework for large-scale table understanding that uses schema and cell retrieval with query expansion to provide compact, relevant table evidence to language models.

problem: Existing LM-based table reasoning methods often require the entire table or large sub-tables, which does not scale well to very large tables and can suffer from context-length limits and information loss.
